response:
Robert M. Fomon was the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of E. F. Hutton & Co., a brokerage firm, and served as a governor of the New York Stock Exchange. He was also Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Pacific Stock Exchange. 

He was not directly connected to the New York Stock Exchange located at 11 Wall Street in the sense of being its owner or operator, but he held significant leadership roles within the exchange's governance structure.
